items.label: Installation
items.content:
# ZYNQ Games

ZYNQ.games is een lightweight game library engine.

Geen backend. Alles draait client-side.

## Install

### Script tag
```html
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.4/index.min.js"></script>
```

### ES Module
```js
import "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/zynq-lib@1.1.4/index.min.js"
```

## Gebruik
```js
await ZYNQ.games.init()
```

Daarna:
```js
ZYNQ.games.list
ZYNQ.games.total
```

items.label: State
items.content:
# Internal State

Dit is de volledige interne state van de engine.

## Config
```ts
config: {
  src: string,
  cdn: string
}
```

## Data
```ts
all: Game[]        // volledige library
filtered: Game[]   // actieve view
```

## User State
```ts
favorites: Set<string>
history: string[]
```

## Device
```ts
deviceType: number
```

## Game Object
```ts
{
  name: string,
  alias: string,
  url: string,
  thumb: string,
  category?: string,
  devices: number[],

  isSupported: boolean,
  isFavorite: boolean
}
```

items.label: init()
items.content:
# init(options)

Initialiseert alles.

```js
await ZYNQ.games.init({
  mode: "all",
  search: "bloon",
  sort: "name"
})
```

## Options
- mode: all | supported | favs
- search: string
- sort: name | category | alias
- src: custom json
- cdn: custom thumbnails

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

children.label: search()
children.content:
### search(query)

```js
ZYNQ.games.search("bloon")
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

## Result Example
```json
[
  {
    "name": "Bloons Tower Defense",
    "alias": "bloons-tower-defense",
    "url": "g1/bloons-tower-defense",
    "thumb": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/bloons-tower-defense.webp",
    "category": "strategy",
    "devices": [1,2,3,4],
    "isSupported": true,
    "isFavorite": false
  }
]
```

children.label: getByAlias()
children.content:
### getByAlias(alias)

```js
ZYNQ.games.getByAlias("bloxorz")
```

## Returns
```ts
Game | null
```

## Example
```json
{
  "name": "Bloxorz",
  "alias": "bloxorz",
  "url": "g1/bloxorz",
  "thumb": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/bloxorz.webp",
  "category": "puzzle",
  "devices": [1,2],
  "isSupported": true,
  "isFavorite": false
}
```

children.label: getByCategory()
children.content:
### getByCategory(category)

```js
ZYNQ.games.getByCategory("puzzle")
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

## Example
```json
[
  {
    "name": "2048",
    "alias": "2048",
    "url": "g1/2048",
    "thumb": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/2048.webp",
    "category": "puzzle",
    "devices": [1,2,3,4],
    "isSupported": true,
    "isFavorite": false
  }
]
```

children.label: filterSupported()
children.content:
### filterSupported()

Houdt enkel games die werken op jouw device.

```js
ZYNQ.games.filterSupported()
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

children.label: reset()
children.content:
### reset()

Reset naar volledige lijst.

```js
ZYNQ.games.reset()
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

children.label: sortBy()
children.content:
### sortBy(field)

Sorteert alfabetisch.

## Mogelijke velden
- name
- alias
- category

```js
ZYNQ.games.sortBy("name")
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

children.label: sortByPopularity()
children.content:
### sortByPopularity()

Sorteert op `playCount`.

⚠️ Belangrijk:
- playCount zit NIET standaard in de data
- als het ontbreekt wordt het als 0 gezien

Dus dit werkt alleen goed als jij zelf playCount toevoegt.

```js
ZYNQ.games.sortByPopularity()
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

children.label: shuffle()
children.content:
### shuffle()

Random order.

```js
ZYNQ.games.shuffle()
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

children.label: random()
children.content:
### random(limit)

```js
ZYNQ.games.random(3)
```

## Returns
```ts
ZYNQGames
```

## Example
```json
[
  {
    "name": "Bloxorz",
    "alias": "bloxorz",
    "url": "g1/bloxorz",
    "thumb": "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/un-zynq/thumbnails/g1/bloxorz.webp",
    "category": "puzzle",
    "devices": [1,2],
    "isSupported": true,
    "isFavorite": false
  }
]
```
